title: Dream in Frames: Painting Overhaul
description: Adds the dream painting to your World!!!
body:
# Dream Painting

Adds the Dream in your painting Collection!!!


Ever felt like your Minecraft gallery was missing a certain... speedrunner? This resource pack seamlessly integrates **Dream** into your world by adding him to the official painting collection!

Whether you're building a dedicated fan shrine or just want a legendary face watching over your base, this pack brings the iconic green blob and mask to your walls without replacing the classic feel of the game.

### ✨ Features

* **Custom Dream Art:** High-quality pixel art of Dream added to the painting pool.
* **Vanilla Friendly:** Designed to blend in perfectly with the standard Minecraft aesthetic.
* **Lightweight:** No performance impact—just pure vibes.

---

### 📥 How to Install

Follow these simple steps to get Dream into your world:

1. **Download** the `.zip` file from the "Versions" tab above.
2. Open **Minecraft** and go to **Options** > **Resource Packs**.
3. Click **Open Pack Folder**.
4. Drag and drop the downloaded `.zip` file into that folder.
5. Select the pack in-game by clicking the arrow to move it to the **Selected** column.
6. Click **Done** and start placing those paintings!

> **Note:** If you don't see the Dream painting immediately, keep breaking and replacing your paintings until he appears!

**You are more than welcome to include my mod/datpacks/resourpacks in you _MODPACKS_**


---

**Created by MCAura**
